## What You'll Do _(Job Description)_

We need a full stack developer to join our team. He will be responsible to communicate with clients and mentor the junior developers.

## What You Need to Be Successful _(Skills)_

### Must Have

- 2+ years working as a Full stack developer.
- 2+ years working with mongodb; express.
- Fluent in English(required).

### Nice to Have

More experience in software engineering, the better.
If you are a US citizen, you will be best.

### Relevant Experiences

- interview conduction
- teaching students.

## How to apply

Please send an email to [kyledominick479@gmail.com] with your resume(optional), use 'Full Stack Developer' as subject
